response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on Windows systems (5-10 years) and has no demonstrated domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking. The resume highlights proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, JavaScript, Python, and other languages, but not C++ or SQL Server/Oracle. Financial services domain exposure is minimal and does not meet the role's requirements.
strengths: Strong software development and engineering background with diverse language experience
Proven ability to lead and mentor teams in agile environments
Open-source contributions and technical blogging demonstrate deep technical engagement
concerns: No significant C++ development experience on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
No domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking
Lack of experience with SQL Server or Oracle as required
